title: auricula palinuri
intro: Auricula palinuri, also known as the 'Palmate', is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Primulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and aiding in digestion. Auricula palinuri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
